Today, the @HouseCommerce Energy Subcommittee unanimously advanced my Load Forecasting Enhancement Act to help states and utilities better anticipate rising electricity demand, lower costs, and strengthen grid reliability.

States in the northeast show how bad public policy can drive up energy costs for families. 💸

By passing my Affordable, Reliable, Clean Energy Security Act, Congress can establish nationwide policies that protect consumers & prioritize affordability.
https://t.co/UWU6oegHlN

America faces a growing challenge: meeting rising power demand while making electricity more affordable.

Congress has the tools to streamline permitting and bring more reliable energy online, shielding families from higher electric bills.

Let’s get it done. https://t.co/hGB4bF1rxV

Winning the #AI race while lowering energy costs for families starts with smart policymaking and unleashing American energy. 

Appreciate @SecretaryWright joining us on Capitol Hill to highlight Ohio’s growing role in powering our nation.

I joined @SenJonHusted in Zanesville today to talk energy and Ohio’s role in helping the U.S. meet growing demand.

Our message is clear: increasing production and investing in Ohio workers are essential to boosting our economy and securing long-term American energy independence. https://t.co/ljrzR5zB3W

I am heartbroken by the loss of six servicemembers during an aerial refueling mission in Iraq. Three of those lost were Ohioans serving in the Ohio Air National Guard. 

These brave Americans answered the call to serve our nation, and their sacrifice will never be forgotten.

Bringing certainty to federal regulations inspires investment here at home and reduces energy costs for American families.

It's time to pass the Affordable, Reliable, Clean Energy Security Act and unleash American energy.

RT @ENERGY: 🔥The State of American Oil & Natural Gas:

Thanks to President Trump’s policies, America leads the world in oil and natural gas…

Republicans are UNLEASHING American energy. We are producing more energy than ever, driving gas prices down 7% in 12 months & boosting LNG exports.

We have the energy—it's time to get more reliable power online to secure the grid & make electricity more affordable for families. https://t.co/pDjfIYfdzf

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 11 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Troy Balderson. The social-media posture reads as constructive or diplomatic signal because the strongest matched frame is support, partnership, or official-contact language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy, Iraq / Baghdad / Kirkuk.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around support, partnership, or official-contact language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 2 security-frame hits, 3 supportive or diplomatic hits, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 10 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-07-10T20:06:25Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
